docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY APPELLANT BERSTON, SUSAN MAILED TO RESPONDENT MCROBBIE, STACEY

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2025 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. SUSAN BERSTON DOES NOT OWE STACEY MCROBBIE ANY MONEY. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF AUG-13-2025. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952. JUDGE: HON. CHRISTOPHER C. HITE; CLERK: KCCOLOBONG; NOT REPORTED (D318)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MCROBBIE, STACEY AS TO DEFENDANT BERSTON, SUSAN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-13-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-13-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF STACEY MCROBBIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SUSAN BERSTON IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (NO EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE HEARING SET FOR OCT-22-2025 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2025 TRANSFERRED TO DEPT. 206 FOR REASSIGNMENT - NO JUDGE PRO TEM AVAILABLE. (206)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY DEFENDANT BERSTON, SUSAN
MISCELLANEOUS CIVIL SPECIAL SETTING CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2025 - ASSIGNED TO SMALL CLAIM APPEALS ON OCT-22-2025 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 318. (D206)

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT MCROBBIE, STACEY TAKE NOTHING FROM APPELLANT BERSTON, SUSAN PLAINTIFF/RESPONDENT, MCROBBIE, HAS FAILED TO MEET HER BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT/APPELLANT HAS SHOWN THAT THE JUDGMENT SHOULD BE REVERSED. THE REQUEST TO CORRECT FILED ON SEPTEMBER 2, 2025 IS OFF CALENDAR AS MOOT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR FULL DETAILS. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,112.73 FILED BY MCROBBIE, STACEY AS TO DEFENDANT BERSTON, SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-13-2025 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MINI MINUTES FOR OCT-22-25 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 318
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-20-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BERSTON, SUSAN
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, RECORD TRANSFERRED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-13-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCROBBIE, STACEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BERSTON, SUSAN $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $125.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,325.00, PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF OCT-22-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-22-2025 BY CHRISTOPHER C. HITE. JUDGE: HONORABLE CHRISTOPHER C. HITE; CLERK: KCCOLOBONG; NOT REPORTED (D318).
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
